description_long: This is a robust, rectangular toolbox with a dark green lid and body, accented by slightly lighter green and gray panels. The front features two prominent metal latches with dark blue or black securing tabs, and the sides are equipped with sturdy, metallic handles for easy carrying. The lid is flat with three raised ridges for added strength and grip, and the body has reinforced vertical and horizontal panels for durability. The overall design suggests a heavy-duty, weather-resistant construction suitable for outdoor or garage use. No visible branding or external labels are present, and the box appears to be a single large compartment inside.
description: A heavy-duty, dark green rectangular toolbox with metal latches and side handles, designed for durability and secure storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing two metal latches with dark securing tabs and reinforced paneling.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a single sturdy metal handle and a rectangular panel, with no latches visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with two dark securing tabs on the lid and reinforced paneling, but no handles or latches.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single metal handle, mirroring view 1.
attribute_handle_type: Two folding, rectangular metal handles on the sides with plastic or rubberized grips for comfort and secure carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches with dark plastic or rubber securing tabs; no keyholes or combination locks visible.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers on the exterior.
